name: Osisko Development Corp.
description: Osisko Development Corp. is a gold development company advancing the fully-permitted Cariboo Gold Project in central British Columbia, a 192,000-hectare property, and the Tintic Project in Utah. The company's strategy is to become an intermediate gold producer by advancing past-producing mining camps in mining-friendly jurisdictions, and its shares trade on both the TSXV and NYSE under the symbol ODV.
